text.title: react-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for react-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Exporting anonymous arrow function components: export default () => <div />
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Anonymous components show as "Unknown" in React DevTools and error stack traces, making debugging harder.

failure-mode.description: Passing inline objects or arrays as JSX props: <Comp style={{ color: 'red' }} />
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A new object is created on every render, breaking React.memo equality checks and causing unnecessary child re-renders.
